notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto grounds into a double play, pitcher Landen Roupp to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Pete Crow-Armstrong out at 2nd. Michael Conforto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch singles on a ground ball to right fielder Victor Bericoto. Dansby Swanson scores. Fielding error by right fielder Victor Bericoto.

notableEvents.label: Michael Busch walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch singles on a ground ball to right fielder Victor Bericoto. Dansby Swanson scores. Fielding error by right fielder Victor Bericoto.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Matt Chapman challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Jonah Cox steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.detail: Victor Bericoto called out on strikes.
